# thoth_browser_policy (Resource)

Manages browser policy definitions for a tenant/provider.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Policy display name.
- `policy_json` (String) Policy JSON object.
- `provider_name` (String) Browser provider slug.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the policy is active.
- `created_by` (String) Override created_by audit value.
- `enforcement_mode` (String) Policy mode: monitor or enforce.
- `metadata_json` (String) Arbitrary metadata JSON object.
- `policy_id` (String) Policy ID. If omitted on create, GovAPI generates one.
- `updated_by` (String) Override updated_by audit value.
- `version` (Number) Optional explicit policy version.

### Read-Only

- `compiled_policy_json` (String) Compiled provider-native policy JSON from GovAPI.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier (policy ID).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `updated_at` (String) Update timestamp.
